issues.title: Organization isolation vs reference models
issues.attack: 3 reference models lack organization field, violating project-wide org isolation rule
issues.response: Reference data is global system master. Will mark as org-isolation exception, restrict CRUD to staff only

issues.title: URL routing mismatch (/reference/ vs /clients/)
issues.attack: clients.urls included under /clients/ but spec uses /reference/ prefix
issues.response: Will add separate urls_reference.py and register /reference/ in main/urls.py

issues.title: Sidebar HTMX target mismatch (main vs #main-content)
issues.attack: hx-target='main' doesn't match project standard #main-content
issues.response: Typo fix to #main-content

issues.title: Tab container id inconsistency (#ref-content vs #tab-content)
issues.attack: Spec uses #ref-content but project convention is #tab-content
issues.response: Will use #ref-tab-content as dedicated container for reference page tabs

issues.title: Schema migration strategy missing for existing models
issues.attack: Destructive schema changes on P01 models without migration plan
issues.response: Will enumerate field additions/removals per model. Tables are empty so no backfill needed

issues.title: University tier system incompatibility (S/A/B vs SKY/SSG)
issues.attack: P01 S/A/B tier values incompatible with P12 SKY/SSG system
issues.response: Will include mapping table. Tables empty so AlterField suffices

issues.title: Name-based upsert fragile for duplicates
issues.attack: Name alone insufficient for idempotent upsert across all 3 models
issues.response: University uses (name, country) composite unique. Cert keeps unique name. Company uses unique name with error report for collisions

issues.title: CSV import preview flow undefined
issues.attack: 2-step preview/confirm flow lacks state storage, token, URL design
issues.response: Simplified to single POST + immediate processing + result report. No preview step needed for admin-verified CSV

issues.title: CSV import error handling rules missing
issues.attack: No specs for header validation, encoding errors, partial success
issues.response: Will add header validation, encoding rules, transaction-level rollback on any error, error report with row numbers

issues.title: CSV export conflicts with HTMX navigation
issues.attack: Download response may get injected into DOM via HTMX
issues.response: Export will use plain <a> with hx-boost=false, Content-Disposition: attachment

issues.title: Delete protection references undefined
issues.attack: No FK references to reference models exist, making delete protection hollow
issues.response: No FK references currently exist in codebase. Delete protection unnecessary at P12. Will add when FK references are introduced

issues.title: Autofill web search API dependency undefined
issues.attack: Which API, timeout, retry, cost, error UX all missing
issues.response: Will specify Gemini API + Google Search grounding, 10s timeout, failure toast, no auto-save

issues.title: Autofill data leak risk
issues.attack: Sending company names to external API may leak confidential client/target info
issues.response: CompanyProfile is global master of public companies, not confidential Client data

issues.title: No permission model for reference CRUD
issues.attack: Any logged-in user can modify master data with only @login_required
issues.response: CRUD restricted to staff. Read/export open to all logged-in users

issues.title: aliases JSONField search/CSV serialization rules missing
issues.attack: No normalization, case handling, CSV format for JSON array field
issues.response: Aliases stored as JSON array with trim. CSV uses semicolon delimiter. Search uses case-insensitive contains

issues.title: Initial data source and refresh policy missing
issues.attack: Listed companies change frequently but treated as static fixture
issues.response: Data sources specified (DART, manual). Periodic refresh out of P12 scope. Manual refresh via CSV update + command re-run

issues.title: Delete protection references undefined (follow-up)
issues.attack: Restatement — no new evidence
issues.response: Red team accepted author's rebuttal. No FK references exist.

issues.title: Autofill data leak risk (follow-up)
issues.attack: CompanyProfile includes 비상장 companies. Spec says unlisted companies added during project registration. Autofill sends arbitrary names to external API, revealing operator interest
issues.response: Valid point. Will add external transmission notice on autofill button, explicit user action only, no auto-save

issues.title: clients/admin.py not updated after model field removal
issues.attack: admin.py references preference_tier and old fields that will be removed by migration
issues.response: Add admin.py update step in Task 1

issues.title: company_autofill view requires pk but create form has no pk
issues.attack: Design spec says autofill works on create form, but view needs existing object
issues.response: Change autofill to accept name via POST body, remove pk requirement

issues.title: Task 4 placeholder views cause template errors
issues.attack: reference_index.html includes company/cert tabs but views/templates don't exist yet
issues.response: Create stub views and empty tab templates in Task 4

issues.title: aliases __icontains on JSONField is fragile
issues.attack: Searches serialized JSON text, not individual array elements
issues.response: Keep __icontains as practical approximation. Works for short alias tokens. Add comment.

issues.title: CSV handler two-pass approach has subtle issues
issues.attack: Validate then re-read and upsert is complex and could miss second-pass errors
issues.response: Simplify to single-pass: validate + upsert per row within one atomic block

issues.title: _render_reference_page always loads university data
issues.attack: Falls back to university data even when active tab is companies or certs
issues.response: Make helper tab-aware
